overview: Universal Shop Manager is a globally scalable POS and inventory solution for all shop types and countries. It features 16+ shop types, full billing with partial payments, customer profiles, smart alerts, return & refund system with store credit, barcode scanning, supplier management, and a Super Admin panel.
features: Return & Refund system with partial item returns and shop owner approval workflow
Store credit — customers earn on approved returns, use in future bills
Return history per bill and per customer profile
16+ shop types — Mobile, Electronics, Clothing, Jewelry, Medical, Grocery, and more
Full billing with part/full payment tracking and WhatsApp sharing
Smart Alerts — expiry, low stock, dead stock, pending payments
Supplier management with price comparison modal
Barcode scanning for product entry and billing
Super Admin panel — manage all shops and users
